diagrams.title: Propositional vs First-Order Logic Syntax
diagrams.description: Comparison of syntax elements between PL and FOL
diagrams.purpose: Understanding structural differences between the two logical systems

diagrams.title: Inference Rules Flowchart
diagrams.description: Shows how Modus Ponens, Modus Tollens, and Resolution work
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the inference rule application process

diagrams.title: Forward vs Backward Chaining
diagrams.description: Contrasts the two major inference strategies
elements: Forward: Facts → Match Rules → New Facts → Continue
Backward: Goal → Find Rules → Sub-goals → Facts → Backtrack
diagrams.purpose: Understanding when to use each chaining method in expert systems
